case_title: GAYLORD ASSOCIATES VS. MATTHEW IMBACH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 620 JONES STREET, UNIT NUMBER 1004 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P. SERVED OCT-28-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ; ENDORSED COPY PLACED IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P. SERVED OCT-28-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT IMBACH, MATTHEW AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $70.00 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAYLORD ASSOCIATES L.P.
